queue_item.action: Standardize deployment and runtime verification as an ordered same-context WebDriver BiDi evidence transcript.

progress.finding: Correlate navigation, document response, load, runtime commit evaluation, and screenshot capture in one monotonic same-context transcript; do not treat any isolated observation as complete deployment proof.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime

queue_item.handoff: Vercel Studio and Cloudflare Research should add provider-specific WebDriver BiDi adapters that emit this common transcript, then wrap the accepted transcript with the existing R-002 evidence envelope and R-003/R-004 attestation and trusted-builder controls.
